function.name: task_create
function.description: Create a new task in the team queue (.data/team.db). The task starts in 'pending' state and is unassigned. Returns the new task id.

title.description: Short title of the task (1 line)

type.description: Task type — drives which persona picks it up (pm/architect/developer/reviewer/tester/docs)

depends_on.description: Comma-separated task ids that must reach 'done' before this task can be claimed (e.g. '2,3')
